title: flowers for Algernon
reason: sometimes i lie in bed and pray to god that some tragic events will happen to me so that I will have the right to be sad sometimes, i just want to have a lobotomy.

title: Intermitências da Morte
reason: What if we stop dying? Not like Vampires which can preserve their youth, we are just stuck in this body. Even if you want to go to hell, you cannot. Will it be more fun to watch the world fall apart in such a way or just...having a disaster that take us all. But by all means I don't make it into heaven.wwww
